---
title: "graphs"
author: "Jessica Larrick"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r tactic and stage graphs, making long data frame}
library(tidyverse)

tacticsgraph_2023 <- merged_cleanoutliers %>%
  filter(Year == 2023) %>%      # keep only 2023 rows so Stage_Num is from 2023
  select(
    WATER_SYSTEM_ID,            # your supplier ID
    Stage_Num, # stage for 2023 (since you filtered Year == 2023)
    Stage2015,
    matches("Used_.*_2023$")    # all tactic columns ending in _2023
  )

tacticsgraph_long_2023 <- tacticsgraph_2023 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("Used_.*_2023$"),
    names_to = "tactic",
    values_to = "months_used"
  ) %>%
  mutate(tactic = str_remove(tactic, "_2023$"))


```

```{r plotting regression results by tactics(use directly after running reg)}
library(broom)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)

# 1. Extract coefficients from all models into one dataframe
coef_df <- map_df(names(models), function(y) {
  tidy(models[[y]]) %>%
    mutate(year = as.numeric(y))
})

# 2. Keep only the three coefficients I want to plot
plot_df <- coef_df %>%
  filter(term %in% c("eff2015", "Stage2015", "eff2015:Stage2015"))

# 3. Make the coefficient path plot
ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = year, y = estimate, color = term)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = estimate - 1.96 * std.error,
                    ymax = estimate + 1.96 * std.error),
                width = 0.1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "eff2015" = "slategrey",
      "Stage2015" = "black",
      "eff2015:Stage2015" = "blue"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "eff2015" = "Effective 2015",
      "Stage2015" = "Stage 2015",
      "eff2015:Stage2015" = "Effective × Stage"
    )
  ) +
    
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Coefficient Estimate",
    color = "Term",
    title = "Rebate Use Coefficient Paths"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")
  )
  
ggsave("Rebate_Coefficient_Paths.pdf", width = 7, height = 5)


```

```{r case study supplier-specific tactic use tables}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

sweetwater <- "CA3710025"

summary_table <- stage2_data %>%
  filter(WATER_SYSTEM_ID == sweetwater) %>%
  select(starts_with("Used_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = c("tactic", "year"),
    names_pattern = "Used_(.*)_(.*)",
    values_to = "count"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = year,
    values_from = count
  ) %>%
  arrange(tactic)
library(flextable)
library(officer)

ft <- flextable(summary_table)

# Create a Word document, add the table, save
doc <- read_docx() %>%
  body_add_flextable(ft)

print(doc, target = "sweetwater.docx")

```
